subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thine illustrious letter was received, and from its sweet contents came the utmost joy and delight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه نامی وصول ارزانی نمود از مضامین شکرین نهایت روح و ریحان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
